title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Prudential Life in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
